results.title: Dutch referee dropped from World Cup dies at 38
results.description: New Delhi, July 14 (SocialNews.XYZ) Dutch football referee Rob Dieperink has died weeks after he was removed from officiating at the World Cup following a police case in Britain that was later dropped. Dieperink was... The post Dutch referee dropped from World Cup dies at 38 appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: DANE ELDRIDGE: Brendon McCullum is no longer England Test coach in a major blow to Pom-hating Ausssies
results.description: The Poms have finally accepted the obvious, but it’s a sad day for this group of cricket fans.

results.title: Maloney cards 78 to capture Pennhills stop
Vignette teasing former wrestler’s return airs during WWE Raw
results.description: A new tease on Raw all but confirms the incoming return of Big Cass. The short 20-second vignette showed quick-moving clips of fans reacting to Cass. results.title: Iconos de España y Francia, Lamine Yamal y Kylian Mbappe durante la semifinal de la Euro 2024.
results.description: El historial favorece ligeramente a España, que en 38 enfrentamientos suma 18 victorias, por 13 de Francia y siete empates.
